name: pandas-numpy-lib

metadata.name: pandas-numpy-lib
metadata.summary: A library to combine pandas and numpy functionalities.

documentation:
# pandas_numpy_lib

A simple library to combine functionalities of pandas and numpy.

## Installation

You can install the library using pip:

```bash
pip install pandas_numpy_lib

functions.name: pandas_numpy_lib.core.create_dataframe_from_array
documentation: Converts a numpy array into a pandas DataFrame.

functions.name: pandas_numpy_lib.core.add_column_to_dataframe
documentation: Adds a column to an existing pandas DataFrame from a numpy array.

functions.name: pandas_numpy_lib.core.normalize_column
documentation: Normalizes a column in the DataFrame using numpy.
